name: Aurora Desk Lamp
description: An adjustable aluminum desk lamp with warm and cool light modes for focused work and late-night reading.

name: Linen Notebook Set
description: A set of three cloth-bound notebooks with dotted paper, perfect for planning, sketching, or journaling.

name: Glide Wireless Mouse
description: An ergonomic wireless mouse with silent clicks, programmable buttons, and precision tracking.

name: Cove Cable Organizer
description: A modular cable tray and clip set that keeps chargers, hubs, and cords tucked neatly away.

name: Ember Standing Desk
description: A compact sit-stand desk with memory presets, oak finish, and cable passthrough for tidy workdays.

name: Harbor Monitor Stand
description: A walnut riser that lifts your display, hides small accessories, and creates room for keyboards below.

name: Atlas Mechanical Keyboard
description: A low-profile mechanical keyboard with tactile switches, hot-swap sockets, and soft white backlighting.

name: Orbit Webcam Light
description: A clip-on ring light tuned for calls, streams, and late-night meetings with adjustable warmth.

name: Prism Pen Cup
description: A weighted steel organizer for pens, scissors, and styluses with a powder-coated matte finish.

name: Hush Desk Mat
description: A vegan leather desk mat that softens keyboard noise and protects surfaces from scratches and spills.

name: Ripple Ceramic Mug
description: A hand-finished ceramic mug with a rippled grip and a generous capacity for coffee or tea.

name: Drift Throw Blanket
description: A soft woven blanket with a breathable cotton blend and reversible tonal pattern.

name: Ember Candle Set
description: A trio of soy candles in cedar, fig, and amber glass jars designed for slow evenings at home.

name: Willow Serving Tray
description: A rounded ash wood tray for breakfast in bed, coffee service, or styling the living room table.

name: Grove Planter
description: A self-watering indoor planter with a hidden reservoir and stoneware texture for small greens.

name: Hearth Table Lamp
description: A dimmable bedside lamp with a linen shade and warm brass stem for a softer nighttime glow.

name: Salt Stone Coasters
description: A set of four sandstone coasters with cork backs to protect wood surfaces from rings and heat.

name: Dune Storage Basket
description: A woven cotton basket with reinforced handles for throws, toys, or entryway catch-all storage.

name: Harbor Wall Clock
description: A silent sweep wall clock with matte numerals and a deep frame that suits calm modern interiors.

name: Moss Linen Pillow
description: A linen accent pillow with feather insert and washed texture that layers easily on sofas and beds.

name: Solstice Speaker
description: A compact wireless speaker with rich bass, USB-C charging, and 14 hours of battery life.

name: Pulse Headphones
description: Over-ear noise-canceling headphones with plush memory foam cushions and fast charging.

name: Echo Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with transparency mode, pocket charging case, and crisp call microphones.

name: Vinyl Turntable
description: A belt-drive turntable with Bluetooth output, walnut plinth, and switchable phono preamp.

name: Wave Soundbar
description: A slim soundbar with Dolby Audio support, HDMI ARC, and tailored voice enhancement for TV nights.

name: Studio USB Mic
description: A desktop condenser microphone with tap-to-mute control and cardioid pickup for recording or streaming.

name: Comet Radio
description: A compact digital radio with Bluetooth playback, alarm presets, and a tactile tuning dial.

name: Chord Speaker Stand
description: A pair of powder-coated stands that angle bookshelf speakers for cleaner stereo imaging.

name: Lucid Sleep Sound Machine
description: A bedside sound machine with fan, rain, and ocean loops plus a soft amber night mode.

name: Ember Podcast Boom Arm
description: A low-profile boom arm that keeps microphones stable and out of frame during calls and recording.

name: Wayfinder Backpack
description: A water-resistant 20L backpack with padded laptop sleeve, quick-access pockets, and hidden passport storage.

name: Atlas Passport Wallet
description: A slim leather travel wallet with RFID blocking, boarding pass sleeve, and coin pocket.

name: Transit Packing Cubes
description: A six-piece nesting cube set that keeps clothes, chargers, and laundry organized on the move.

name: Roam Weekender
description: A structured overnight duffel with shoe compartment, trolley sleeve, and recycled canvas shell.

name: Trail Luggage Tag
description: A durable silicone luggage tag with hidden contact card and secure stainless tether.

name: Horizon Neck Pillow
description: A memory foam travel pillow with magnetic closure and machine-washable jersey cover.

name: Carry-On Dopp Kit
description: A spill-resistant toiletry kit with hanging hook, clear pocket panels, and wipe-clean lining.

name: Summit Tech Pouch
description: A zip-flat organizer for adapters, cables, SSDs, and pens with elastic interior loops.

name: Voyage Travel Journal
description: A lay-flat travel journal with prompts, map pages, and archival paper for trip memories.

name: Compass Umbrella
description: A wind-resistant compact umbrella with reflective trim and automatic open-close handle.

name: Summit Water Bottle
description: A double-wall stainless steel bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12.

name: Meadow Aroma Diffuser
description: A quiet ultrasonic diffuser with ambient glow, timer presets, and a matte ceramic finish.

name: Balance Yoga Mat
description: A grippy natural rubber mat with alignment lines and cushioned support for home practice.

name: Restore Foam Roller
description: A textured recovery roller with dual-density zones for post-run mobility and muscle release.

name: Sunrise Alarm Clock
description: A wake light that simulates dawn, adds calming sounds, and supports gentle evening wind-downs.

name: Cloud Eye Mask
description: A softly contoured sleep mask with blackout lining and adjustable strap for flights or naps.

name: Zen Massage Ball Set
description: A cork massage ball duo for feet, shoulders, and targeted tension relief after long desk days.

name: Daily Vitamin Case
description: A compact seven-day organizer with removable pods that slips neatly into work or gym bags.

name: Breeze Humidifier
description: A top-fill humidifier with whisper-quiet mist, auto shutoff, and a slim bedroom-friendly footprint.

name: Calm Weighted Wrap
description: A microwaveable shoulder wrap with gentle weight and flaxseed fill for cozy evening recovery.
